title: Stormbound
description: The sky is alive, no longer just decoration. From calm rains to raging tempests, every shift in weather reshapes the world and challenges your survival.
body:
(WARNING: MAY BLOW UP PC)
                              
                              
                              ⚡ System Requirements ⚡
                                        Minimum

                        CPU: Intel i5 / AMD Ryzen 5 (or equivalent)
        
                              GPU: GTX 1050 Ti / RX 570

                                      RAM: 8 GB

                                Storage: 2 GB free space

            Notes: Playable, but you may experience heavy lag during storms.

                                      Recommended

                          CPU: Intel i7 / AMD Ryzen 7 (or better)

                GPU: GTX 1660 Ti Super (or better required for full experience)

                                        RAM: 16 GB+

                                  Storage: 4 GB free space

     Notes: Smooth performance even during massive tornadoes, blizzards, and storm events.

                                    Extra information:

                          Credits to: Appleandbees (Minecraft username)
                          
                     For helping make the modpack and giving many ideas for it

                                    ✨ Core Features:

🌪️ Tornadoes & Cyclones – Deadly storms that rip through terrain and challenge your survival.

⚡ Dynamic Thunderstorms – Realistic lightning, rolling thunder, and storm fronts that shift naturally.

❄️ Blizzards & Snowstorms – Weather that can blind, slow, and bury landscapes in white.

🌦️ Immersive Weather Cycles – From gentle breezes and drifting fog to violent tempests.

🛡️ New Gear to Survive the Storms:

Elemental Armor Sets – Craft storm-resistant gear to withstand blizzards, lightning, and wind.

Weather-Forged Tools – Unique tools and weapons infused with elemental power, forged from the chaos of storms.

Special Enhancements – Unlock storm-related abilities that turn the weather into your ally or your weapon.

Survival isn’t just about hiding from the storm anymore—it’s about mastering it.
